domain: office equipment, printer/scanner mechanisms, desk hardware, file storage, and workspace adjustment parts

ideas.core_function: Raises the paper stack incrementally so pickup rollers maintain consistent contact pressure
ideas.likely_main_part: Eccentric lift cam with keyed shaft bore and follower ramp
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires off-center profiles, curved ramp surfaces, shaft interfaces, and controlled clearances for moving contact

ideas.product_context: Flatbed scanner or copier lid mechanism
ideas.core_function: Supports the scanner lid at multiple opening angles while resisting sudden closure
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined hinge arm with pivot bosses, spring anchor holes, and stop faces
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines rotational joints, load-bearing bosses, angular stops, and asymmetric geometry

ideas.core_function: Allows controlled monitor tilt while locking position under display weight
ideas.likely_main_part: Serrated tilt knuckle with central clamp bore and radial teeth
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests circular patterns, interlocking teeth, clamp geometry, and orientation-critical mating surfaces

ideas.core_function: Transfers user lever motion to the gas cylinder release button
ideas.likely_main_part: Stamped-style machined lever bracket with pivot hole, actuator tab, and cable slot
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires thin-wall features, offset tabs, bend-like geometry, pivot alignment, and actuation clearances

ideas.core_function: Prevents more than one drawer from opening at the same time
ideas.likely_main_part: Vertical interlock slider bar with stepped notches and drawer latch contact faces
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests long slender parts, repeated notch features, precise slot relationships, and functional interference geometry

ideas.product_context: Duplex printing path inside an office printer
ideas.core_function: Redirects paper between the output path and reverse feed path for two-sided printing
ideas.likely_main_part: Pivoting diverter gate with curved guide rib and axle journals
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires thin curved surfaces, rib geometry, pivot journals, and smooth paper-path transitions

ideas.core_function: Locks the tray at selected extension positions and releases with a small handle motion
ideas.likely_main_part: Spring-loaded pawl with tooth profile, pivot boss, and release tab
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests ratchet teeth, small pivot features, spring seats, and mechanically meaningful contact angles

ideas.product_context: Automatic document feeder for scanner or multifunction printer
ideas.core_function: Mounts a friction roller while coupling it to a drive shaft and allowing service replacement
ideas.likely_main_part: Roller hub with splined bore, retaining groove, and outer sleeve shoulder
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires concentric cylinders, splines, grooves, shoulders, and tolerance-sensitive rotational features

ideas.core_function: Clamps a telescoping crossbar to the desk leg frame while preserving alignment
ideas.likely_main_part: Clamp block with split bore, bolt bosses, alignment tongue, and relief pockets
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests split clamp geometry, fastener features, structural pockets, and assembly-driven constraints

ideas.idea_title: Modular Desk Cable Grommet Iris Ring
ideas.product_context: Cable management port in an office desk surface
ideas.core_function: Adjusts the opening size around routed cables while keeping the desktop pass-through covered
ideas.likely_main_part: Rotating iris ring with overlapping blade slots and detent notches
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires annular parts, repeating curved slots, detents, overlapping motion paths, and user-adjustable mechanism geometry
